Business Name: Truck Parking Club - 799 12th Ave N (Bobtail/Box Truck Parking)
Description: Bookable bobtail and box-truck parking lot just west of downtown Nashville with advertised access to I-40 and I-65. HELD: single source (Truck Parking Club listing) and no source places it at a specific I-40 exit 196-221; downtown location may fall on the I-65 corridor instead.
24-hour Pilot travel center at I-40 Exit 238 in Lebanon with 8 fuel lanes, showers, CAT scale, and large truck parking lot including prime/reserved spaces.

Independent truck stop at I-40 Exit 239A in Lebanon, famous for its full-service restaurant and coffee-mug collection. CAT scale, tire repair, truck wash, showers, laundry, and patrolled lighted parking. Open 4:30 AM to 11 PM daily.

24-hour Pilot travel center at I-40 Exit 258 (TN-53, Carthage/Gordonsville) with 7 diesel lanes, 7 showers, CAT scale, laundry, Wendy's, and roughly 75 truck parking spots including reserved/paid spaces.

24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-40 Exit 280 (TN-56, Baxter) with 8 diesel lanes, 7 showers, CAT scale, laundry, WiFi, McDonald's and Subway, plus on-site Love's Truck Care with tire and truck repair bays.
24-hour ONE9 Travel Center (Pilot Company network, formerly Pilot #265) at I-40 Exit 287 in Cookeville with 3 fuel lanes, shower, CAT scale, deli, and convenience store.
TA Express travel center at I-40 Exit 288 in Cookeville (former Super Truck & Travel Plaza) with 59 truck parking spaces, 6 showers, CAT scale, laundry, driver's lounge, and 24/7 gas and diesel.
Independent 24-hour Roady's travel plaza at I-40 Exit 320 in Crossville with about 60 truck parking spots, 7 fuel lanes, 2 showers, laundry, WiFi, Dairy Queen, and truck scales.

Official Tennessee welcome center/rest area on I-40 at mile marker 267 in Smith County, serving both eastbound and westbound traffic from a single bidirectional facility. Separate truck and passenger parking, restrooms, water, and picnic tables. Open 24 hours.
Bookable truck and trailer parking lot off I-40 Exit 301 in Monterey with 24/7 access and video security, one block from fuel, convenience stores, and restaurants. Reserve via Truck Parking Club.
Bookable truck and trailer parking on Salem Rd near I-40 Exit 288 in Cookeville, offered hourly, daily, weekly, and monthly via Truck Parking Club (approximately $22/day).

15-acre gated gravel truck and RV parking lot just off I-40 Exit 320 in Crossville, next to the Pilot Travel Center. 24/7 access, roaming security, oversized-vehicle and hazmat parking, monthly assigned spaces; bookable via Truck Parking Club.

Truck wash at Uncle Pete's Truck Stop, I-40 Exit 239A in Lebanon, alongside the truck stop's CAT scale and tire repair services.

HELD: Hotel near I-40 Exit 287. Guest reviews and aggregator listings mention a large lot that accommodates trucks, but no explicit official truck-parking amenity confirmation was found on bestwestern.com. Needs direct confirmation before publishing.

Description: HELD: A westbound public truck parking area on I-40 near Monterey appears on TruckMap/Trucker Path, but no official TDOT/tn.gov source or civic address could be verified. Per policy, public rest/parking facilities require an official Tennessee source.
